question: Will May 2026 core CPI rise at least 0.4% month-over-month?
reason: April 2026 core CPI rose 0.4% month-over-month, indicating potential for continued inflation.
evidence: April 2026 core CPI increased by 0.4% month-over-month, the sharpest rise since January 2025.
Year-over-year core CPI reached 2.8% in April 2026, up from 2.6% in March.
Energy prices surged 3.8% in April, contributing significantly to the overall CPI increase.
The Federal Reserve faces challenges in addressing inflation amid geopolitical tensions affecting energy prices.
